creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 159116
Default Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk to postgresql94-*

Postgresql 9.4 has been released on 2014-12-18. By now, it's at 9.4.4 (released 2015-06-12) and comes with many interesting features (see release notes [1]).

Patch attached sets postgresql 9.4 as default version.

[1] http://www.postgresql.org/docs/9.4/static/release.html
